scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loanforge/shared && npm run build -w @loanforge/server && npm run build -w @loanforge/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w @loanforge/server" "npm run start -w @loanforge/web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @loanforge/shared && npm run lint -w @loanforge/server && npm run lint -w @loanforge/web
